B.x: 20 BLOCK TYPES
Vela Block Type Catalog
A complete showcase of every block type available in the Vela presentation engine — from text and data to flow, code, and visuals.

S.n: Heading & Text Blocks Anchor Every Slide

B.x: heading · text
Heading & Text Blocks Anchor Every Slide
Scale From 4xl Down to sm
The heading block supports sizes from sm to 4xl with configurable weight and color. Use it to establish visual hierarchy across your slides — titles, subheads, and eyebrow labels.
Body Copy Flows Alongside
Body text is fully styleable: size, color, weight, and alignment. Pair with headings to create readable, scannable slide layouts at any density.

Quotes & Callouts Surface What Matters Most
Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
B.author: Steve Jobs, Apple

B.x: Use callouts to highlight tips, warnings, or key takeaways. They support icons, custom backgrounds, and rich text content.
B.title: Pro Tip

B.x: Destructive operations cannot be undone. Always confirm intent before proceeding.
B.title: Warning

Each item renders with consistent spacing and optional sub-descriptions
Ideal for feature lists, requirements, and key takeaways

S.n: Code & Image Blocks Anchor Technical Slides

B.x: code · image
Code & Image Blocks Anchor Technical Slides
The image block accepts a src URL or base64 data URI — use it for screenshots, architecture diagrams, and brand photography.
B.title: Image Block

S.n: SVG, Spacer & Divider Complete the Visual Toolkit

B.x: svg · spacer · divider
SVG, Spacer & Divider Complete the Visual Toolkit
The SVG block renders inline vector graphics — perfect for custom icons, sparklines, and illustrated diagrams.

<svg viewBox='0 0 560 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='560' height='80' rx='12' fill='#1E293B'/><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='22' fill='#3B82F6'/><text x='40' y='46' text-anchor='middle' fill='white' font-size='14' font-family='sans-serif' font-weight='700'>SVG</text><rect x='80' y='20' width='200' height='10' rx='5' fill='#3B82F6' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='80' y='38' width='140' height='8' rx='4' fill='#94A3B8' opacity='0.5'/><rect x='80' y='54' width='170' height='7' rx='3' fill='#94A3B8' opacity='0.3'/><circle cx='360' cy='30' r='15' fill='#22C55E' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='400' cy='40' r='20' fill='#F59E0B' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='445' cy='28' r='12' fill='#EF4444' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='490' cy='42' r='18' fill='#3B82F6' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='530' cy='32' r='10' fill='#A855F7' opacity='0.8'/></svg>
Spacers (bare integers like 8 or 12) inject precise vertical whitespace. Dividers (with optional dl labels) separate logical sections with a styled horizontal rule.
